HeadDescription: Welcome to Dawaer Tech, the leading company providing comprehensive technology solutions that support digital transformation and ensure the security of infrastructure for organizations and businesses in Saudi Arabia.
heroDescription: Welcome to Dawaer Tech, the leading company providing comprehensive technology solutions that support digital transformation and ensure the security of infrastructure for organizations and businesses in Saudi Arabia.
heroDescriptionMobile: We offer innovative technology solutions to support digital transformation and secure the infrastructure for businesses in Saudi Arabia.
aboutUsDescription: Dawaer Tech was established in Riyadh to provide comprehensive technology solutions that support digital transformation and contribute to building a secure and reliable digital infrastructure.
aboutUsDescriptionSpan: With our specialized team and accumulated expertise, we deliver advanced technology solutions that cater to various sectors.
aboutUsMissionDescription: We strive to empower organizations to reach their full potential by providing innovative technology solutions that meet their needs and help them achieve success.
aboutUsVisionDescription: To be the leading partner for organizations in Saudi Arabia in the field of digital transformation and digital infrastructure security.
servicesDescription: At Dawaer Tech, we offer a comprehensive range of technology services designed to support your business and meet your unique needs.
infrastructureService1: Design and implementation of data centers.
infrastructureService2: Information security and data protection solutions.
digitalTransformationDescription:
- Data analysis using AI.
- Robotic Process Automation (RPA).
- Performance optimization solutions.
securityDescription:
- Smart surveillance systems.
- Securing sensitive sites and facilities.
businessManagementDescription:
- Customer Relationship Management (CRM) systems.
- Custom digital platforms.
- Visitor management systems.
clientsDescription: We take pride in the trust our clients and partners place in Dawaer Tech. We work alongside a variety of global and local companies to deliver technology solutions that meet the highest quality standards.
formErrorMessage: Failed to send the message. Please try again.
contactUsDescription: We are here to help! If you need a technology consultation or want to learn more about our services, feel free to reach out to us.
phoneInvalidMessage: Please enter a valid phone number
phoneMinLengthMessage: Phone number must be at least 8 digits
contactInfoDescription: You can contact us and follow us on our social media accounts.
followUs: Follow us for the latest updates!
errorMessageDescription: You can contact us via WhatsApp to resolve the issue immediately.
thankYouHeading: Thank You for Submitting Your Information!
thankYouText: We appreciate your cooperation and will get back to you as soon as possible.
heroSubtitle: Get your certified contract from the Ejar network from anywhere in the Kingdom
counterAreaSubtitle: Use the Easel Aqd platform to certify your residential and commercial contracts easily and efficiently
featuresSubtitle: One of the best features of Easel Aqd is its ease of use and its ability to save time and effort when certifying residential and commercial contracts.
feature1Bullet1: Officially accredited by the Ministry of Housing and Ejar Platform.
feature1Bullet2: Licensed by the General Authority for Real Estate to operate.
feature1Bullet3: Holds Ejar membership certificate as an accredited real estate agent.
feature2Bullet1: All contract certification steps are done online.
feature2Bullet2: No need for in-person visits or manual document submission.
feature2Bullet3: Fast and easy certification without waiting.
feature3Bullet1: A support team is available for direct communication at any time.
feature3Bullet2: We work all week to meet your contract certification needs.
feature3Bullet3: You can request a residential or commercial contract from any city within the Kingdom.
stepsSubtitle: Choose a contract type, prepare the documents, fill in the details, sign and receive your contract, with technical support available to assist you
step1Description: Select the appropriate contract type (residential or commercial) directly on the website
step2Description: Gather the necessary data and documents for either a residential or commercial contract
step3Description: Enter all required information into the available online form
step4Description: After receiving your request, Easel Aqd reviews the data and certifies the contract online via the approved Ejar platform
step5Description: The certified electronic contract is delivered to you via email or WhatsApp, ready for use
step6Description: You can contact us at any step for assistance via phone or WhatsApp. Our team is ready to provide support and ensure a smooth experience
residentialFeature2: Requested by the landlord or tenant
commercialFeature2: Requested by the landlord or tenant
licensesSectionSubtitle: Easel Aqd Real Estate Services is licensed by the Ministry of Commerce and the General Authority for Real Estate, and is accredited by the Ejar Platform. These licenses reflect our reliability and professionalism in providing contract certification services.
footerAboutText: Get your certified contract from the Ejar network from anywhere in the Kingdom
homeTitle: Easel Aqd - Certify Your Residential & Commercial Rental Contracts in Saudi Arabia
homeDescription: Certify your rental contracts online via the Easel Aqd platform, accredited by the Ejar network. Our services ensure rapid and efficient certification of both residential and commercial contracts from anywhere in the Kingdom.
homeKeywords: rental contract certification, electronic rental contract, residential rental contracts, commercial rental contracts, Ejar platform, accredited real estate agent, General Authority for Real Estate, online certification, Easel Aqd, certified contracts, rental certification in Saudi Arabia
